title: EVAL
markdowncitizenship:
# Citizenship Portal

Welcome to the Citizenship Information and Application Portal.

---

## 📰 News
Stay updated with the latest citizenship and immigration updates.

- Policy changes
- Naturalization updates
- Residency law changes by country

---

## 🧾 Eligibility

Check if you qualify for citizenship:

- Minimum residency period
- Legal permanent residency status
- Language requirements (if applicable)
- Clean legal record (varies by country)

---

## 🌍 Citizenship Application

Basic application details:

### Application Form

**Full Name**  
Your legal full name.

**Current Nationality**  
Your current citizenship.

**Country Applying To**  
The country where you are applying for citizenship.

**Residency Duration**  
How long you have lived in the country.

**Language Proficiency**  
Level of official language ability.

---

## 📌 Status (Future Feature)

- Application submitted
- Under review
- Interview scheduled
- Approved / Denied
- Oath ceremony pending

---

## 📎 Notes
- This is a demo layout
- No data is stored
- Can be extended into a full system
markdownsupport:
# Support

If you experience issues while using the application, please contact support with the following information when possible:

- A description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce the problem
- Screenshots or error messages
- Browser and device information

Response times are not guaranteed. Support is provided on a best-effort basis.

## Security Issues

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it responsibly and avoid publicly disclosing sensitive details before the issue has been addressed.

## Availability

Support availability may change without notice. We may modify, suspend, or discontinue support services at any time.
markdownvisa:
# Visa Portal

Welcome to the Visa Information and Application Portal.

---

## 📰 News
Stay updated with the latest immigration and visa policy changes.

- Policy updates will appear here
- Processing delays and alerts
- Country-specific announcements

---

## 🧾 Citizenship
Information about becoming a citizen:

- Eligibility requirements
- Residency rules
- Naturalization process
- Required documents

---

## 🌍 Visa Application

Fill out the basic application details below.

### Application Form

**Full Name**  
Enter your legal name.

**Nationality**  
Your country of citizenship.

**Destination Country**  
Where you plan to travel.

**Visa Type**
- Tourist
- Student
- Work
- Transit

**Travel Date**  
Planned date of entry.

---

## 📌 Status (Future Feature)
- Application submitted
- Under review
- Approved / Rejected
- Additional documents required

---

## 📎 Notes
- This is a demo layout
- No data is currently stored
- You can extend this into a real system with a backend API
markdownhome:
# Visa Guidance Support

Get help understanding visa requirements, documentation, and application steps.

---

## Start here

👉 [Start Checklist](/apply)

👉 [Ask a Question](/chat)

## Important

We provide informational guidance only. Not legal advice.
markdownprivacy:
# Privacy Policy

_Last updated: 2026_

## 1. Overview

We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.  
This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our visa services platform.

---

## 2. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

### Personal Information
- Full name
- Email address
- Phone number
- Passport or travel document details (if provided)
- Application-related information

### Usage Information
- Pages you visit
- Actions you take within the application
- Device and browser information
- Approximate location (for service availability)

---

## 3. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to:

- Process visa applications
- Provide customer support
- Improve our services and user experience
- Send important service updates
- Ensure security and prevent fraud

---

## 4. Sharing of Information

We do not sell your personal data.

We may share information only when necessary:

- With government or visa processing authorities (for application purposes)
- With trusted service providers who help operate our platform
- When required by law

---

## 5. Data Retention

We retain your information only as long as necessary to:

- Provide our services
- Comply with legal obligations
- Resolve disputes and enforce agreements

---

## 6. Security

We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data, including:

- Encrypted data transmission
- Secure storage systems
- Access controls and monitoring

However, no system is 100% secure.

---

## 7. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have rights to:

- Access your personal data
- Request correction of inaccurate data
- Request deletion of your data
- Restrict or object to processing

To exercise these rights, contact us.

---

## 8. Third-Party Services

We may use third-party services for:

- Authentication
- Payment processing
- Analytics

These services have their own privacy policies.

---

## 9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.  
Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

---

## 10. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at:

**support@yourdomain.com**
markdownterms:
# Terms of Service

## Terms

By using this application, you acknowledge that the service is provided **“as is”** without warranties of any kind.

We may collect limited technical information necessary to operate the service, including:

- IP addresses
- Browser information
- Device information
- Application logs

We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, accuracy, security, or fitness for a particular purpose.

Users are responsible for any content they upload, share, or submit through the application. You agree not to use the service for unlawful, abusive, or malicious activities.

We may modify, suspend, or discontinue the service at any time without notice. Continued use of the application constitutes acceptance of these terms.

## Privacy

We aim to minimize data collection whenever practical.

Technical logs may be retained temporarily for:

- Debugging
- Security
- Operational maintenance

Do not submit sensitive personal information unless necessary.
